name: Whole Wheat Batter Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. This recipe makes 2 loaves of bread. For one loaf, use 2 yeast packages instead of 3 and halve all other ingredients.
2. Preheat oven to the lowest temperature setting.
3. In a large bowl, dissolve yeast in 4 cups very warm water. Stir in honey.
4. Coat loaf pans with margarine and flour. Add oil, 2-1/2 cups warm water, salt, and yeast mixture to the flour. Mix well until a sticky dough forms.
5. Gradually add more flour; knead at medium speed for 2 minutes. The dough should be smooth but still sticky.
6. Pour batter into prepared pans, smoothing the surface and tucking dough into corners. Cover with a hot, damp towel.
7. Let rise in a warm place until nearly doubled, about 20 minutes.
8. Check the bread after 20 minutes; it should not have risen beyond the pan edge.
9. Bake at 450°F for about 40 minutes. Remove from pans and cool on racks.
